notes: Key win: list-issues — skill correctly targets ISSUES.md; baseline searched GitHub Issues + Beads (24 tool calls), completely missing the ISSUES.md concept
add-issue: skill produces correct format with header comment and dash placeholders; baseline deviates on empty field format
resolve-issue: both succeed; baseline actually faster (fewer tool calls, no skill preamble overhead)
Skill consistently uses fewer tool calls on list and add (6 vs 24, 11 vs 22) — guidance eliminates tracker exploration overhead
resolve-issue is weakest discriminator — both pass all assertions, baseline is faster
